title: Every Ore has a Use
description: A datapack that allows you to craft tools out of more ores! Requires a Resource Pack.
body:
# What is this Datapack?
"Every Ore has a Use" is a Datapack that adds more tools to the game, including Redstone, Lapis Lazuli, Emerald, Amethyst, Coal, Copper, Quartz, and Obsidian tools!

# Random Information
Made using the new Attribute Modifiers in 1.21. It also added NBT Crafting!
This is my first datapack. I don't have that much experience, so there may be some flaws.

## **Requires a resource pack to play**, or else the datapack won't work.
Resource Pack: [EOHAU Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/every-ore-has-a-use-resource-pack) <-- (click on it to be brought to the download page)

Made by Uilttl or Uilttl2 (we are the same person)
